description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push to master, hotfix/* branches, and tags matching v*, as well as on pull requests. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple OS (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest), Python versions (3.9, 3.8, 3.7), and configurations (Release, Debug). For each job, configure Git, check out sources, set up Python, build the project, run C++ and Python tests, and optionally build and upload a package.
